data.title: Novartis announces expansion of community health programs to close gaps in heart disease and cancer care, targeting more than 30 countries by 2030
data.description: On April 9, 2026, Novartis revealed plans to enhance initiatives aimed at identifying and assisting individuals with heart disease and cancer in underserved areas globally. This development is crucial as tackling chronic illnesses faces obstacles in various nations. Novartis intends to expand its three unique community healthcare strategies, which target bridging healthcare disparities for marginalized populations, from 11 to over 30 countries by 2030.

data.title: Landis+Gyr EMEA begins a new chapter as a standalone company
data.description: Switzerland's CHAM-based company Landis+Gyr EMEA, previously a division of Landis+Gyr Group, embarks on a new journey as an independent entity, focused on catering to clients in Europe, the Middle East, and Africa. After the separation, the EMEA branch will operate autonomously, serving a significant customer base across the three regions.

data.title: Oceanus Group and HashKey Group Announce Strategic Partnership to Modernize Global Trade Finance via Stablecoin Settlement
data.description: Today, on April 9, 2026, Oceanus Group Limited, a food security platform listed on the SGX under the symbol 579, and HashKey Group, a prominent institutional digital asset financial services group with the symbol 3887.HK, disclosed the agreement of a Memorandum of Understanding.

data.title: Stablecoin volumes might surpass $1 quadrillion by 2035, with a potential of $719 trillion. Two factors could drive the surge, according to Chainalysis.
data.description: Chainalysis predicts that the adjusted stablecoin volume is projected to potentially reach $719 trillion by the year 2035. However, the estimate could even surpass that amount if two major macro catalysts occur.

data.title: Fed considers more rate cuts due to Iran tensions. Some officials eye year-end cut as inflation stays above targets.
data.description: Certain officials are considering the possibility of a rate cut towards the end of the year, but there are contrasting views as some are cautioning that there may be a necessity for upward adjustments if inflation continues to exceed target levels.
